inputs.label: Applied Force
inputs.businessContext: Design force acting on the welded joint.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design force acting on the welded joint.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynaklı birleşime etki eden tasarım kuvveti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Force de conception agissant sur le joint soudé.

inputs.label: Allowable Shear Stress
inputs.businessContext: Allowable shear stress for the weld material, as per applicable welding code (e.g., AWS D1.1, EN 1993-1-8).

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowable shear stress for the weld material, as per applicable welding code (e.g., AWS D1.1, EN 1993-1-8).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak malzemesi için izin verilen kayma gerilmesi, ilgili kaynak koduna göre (örn. AWS D1.1, EN 1993-1-8).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zulässige Schubspannung für das Schweißmaterial gemäß geltender Schweißnorm (z. B. AWS D1.1, EN 1993-1-8).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte de cisaillement admissible pour le matériau de soudure, selon le code de soudure applicable (par exemple, AWS D1.1, EN 1993-1-8).

inputs.label: Number of Welds
inputs.businessContext: Number of fillet welds sharing the load.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of fillet welds sharing the load.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Kehlnähte, die die Last teilen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de soudures d'angle partageant la charge.

inputs.label: Length per Weld
inputs.businessContext: Effective length of each individual fillet weld.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective length of each individual fillet weld.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir köşe kaynağının etkili uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur effective de chaque soudure d'angle individuelle.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor to account for uncertainties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety factor to account for uncertainties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için tasarım güvenlik faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité de conception pour tenir compte des incertitudes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
